episode_name: Citywide siege and famine context window
theater_description: Formal blockade/siege of Leningrad, including encirclement, famine, cold, utility collapse, and continuing bombardment.
geometry_method_note: City-bounded to Leningrad rather than the wider Leningrad Front.
military_area_note: No publishable city-specific direct military death series for defenders was identified that is separable from the wider front.
civilian_area_note: This episode is primarily contextual because most mortality in the siege was indirect and therefore excluded from dr_v1_direct.
split_reason: Separated from direct bombardment episodes so starvation and deprivation mortality do not contaminate the direct baseline.
quality_note: Essential context, but not a publishable direct-DR episode.

theater_description: Long-duration shelling of Leningrad during the blockade period and immediately before formal encirclement.
geometry_method_note: City-bounded direct-fire window based on the Saint Petersburg encyclopaedia bombardment entry.
military_area_note: No city-specific defender direct-death count from bombardment was found.
civilian_area_note: The encyclopedia gives a lower-bound civilian direct-death count from artillery; it is kept separate from starvation/famine mortality.
split_reason: Direct artillery deaths are analytically distinct from the broader siege death toll and from single-day air-raid spikes.
quality_note: Strong lower-bound civilian direct-death evidence, but no military-side comparator or denominator.

theater_description: Single-day heavy German air raid on Leningrad during the opening siege period.
geometry_method_note: Single-day citywide air-raid episode nested inside the wider bombardment window.
military_area_note: No military death figure was found for this raid alone.
civilian_area_note: The available source supports only a lower-bound citywide death count.
split_reason: Separated because the 19 September raid is repeatedly identified as one of the most intense single air attacks and has a specific fatality statement.
quality_note: Useful direct-civilian event floor, but no denominator and overlap with the broader bombardment episode.
